_comment: Ticker list for src/triggers/monthly_calendar.py's once-a-month Telegram-channel-only earnings report -- deliberately separate from watchlist.json since this covers companies (e.g. the major banks) not otherwise tracked for price/post purposes. A ticker appearing in more than one category (e.g. NVDA in both Big Tech and AI/Semis) is de-duplicated automatically -- listed under both here just for readability of the category grouping.
